queries.name: Factura Compras
text: INNER JOIN "&CurrentSchema&". PINVOICED AS PID ON PIH.NUM_0 = PID.NUM_0          "
queries.lastLoadedAsTableFormulaText:
{"IncludesReferencedQueries":false,"RootFormulaText":"let
    CurrentServer = Instancia,
    CurrentDatabase = BaseDeDatos,
    CurrentSchema = Esquema,
    Origen = Sql.Database(CurrentServer, CurrentDatabase, [Query="
                                                                SELECT
                                                                    -- Campos de Cabecera (PIH)
                                                                    PIH.INVTYP_0 AS 'Categoria Factura',
                                                                    PIH.NUM_0 AS 'Documento',
                                                                    PIH.PIVTYP_0 AS 'Tipo Factura',
                                                                    PIH.PIHTYP_0 AS 'Categoria Factura Compras',
                                                                    PIH.CPY_0 AS 'Empresa',
                                                                    PIH.FCY_0 AS 'Planta',
                                                                    PIH.ACCDAT_0 AS 'Fecha Contable',
                                                                    PIH.BPR_0 AS 'ProveedorID',
                                                                    PIH.INVNUM_0 AS 'Numero Factura',
                                                                    PIH.STA_0 AS 'Validacion',
                                                                    PIH.SNS_0 AS 'Sentido',
                                                                    PIH.SAT_0 AS 'Provincia',

                                                                    -- Campos de Línea (PID)
                                                                    PID.PIDLIN_0 AS 'Linea',
                                                                    (PIH.NUM_0 + '-' + cast(PID.PIDLIN_0 as varchar)) AS 'DocumentoLinea',
                                                                    PID.FCYLIN_0 AS 'Planta Linea',
                                                                    PID.TYPORI_0 AS 'Origen Linea',
                                                                    PID.NUMORI_0 AS 'Numero Origen',
                                                                    PID.LINORI_0 AS 'Linea Origen',
                                                                    PID.ITMREF_0 AS 'ItemID',
                                                                    PID.ITMDES1_0 AS 'Item Des',
                                                                    PID.ITMDES_0 AS 'Item Des 1',
                                                                    PID.UOM_0 AS 'Unidad Facturacion',
                                                                    PID.QTYUOM_0 AS 'Cantidad',
                                                                    PID.GROPRI_0 AS 'Precio Bruto',
                                                                    PID.PRIREN_0 AS 'Motivo Precio',
                                                                    PID.NETPRI_0 AS 'Precio Neto',
                                                                    PID.DISCRGVAL1_0 AS 'Valor Descuento1',
                                                                    PID.DISCRGVAL2_0 AS 'Valor Descuento2',
                                                                    PID.DISCRGVAL3_0 AS 'Valor Descuento3',
                                                                    PID.LINPURTYP_0 AS 'Tipo Compra',
                                                                    PID.NETCUR_0 AS 'Divisa',
                                                                    PID.POHNUM_0 AS 'Numero Pedido',
                                                                    PID.POPLIN_0 AS 'Linea Pedido Compra',
                                                                    PID.PTHNUM_0 AS 'Numero Recepcion',
                                                                    PID.PTDLIN_0 AS 'Linea2',
                                                                    PID.INVLIN_0 AS 'Linea factura',
                                                                    PID.TSICOD_0 AS 'Familia Estadisitca1',
                                                                    PID.TSICOD_1 AS 'Familia Estadisitca2',
                                                                    PID.VAT_0 AS 'Tipo Impuesto',
                                                                    PID.AMTNOTLIN_0 AS 'Importe Linea AI',
                                                                    PID.AMTATILIN_0 AS 'Importe Linea II',
                                                                    PID.AMTDEPLIN_0 AS 'Importe Descuento',
                                                                    PID.AMTTAXLIN1_0 AS 'Importe Impuesto',
                                                                    PID.DEDTAXLIN1_0 AS 'Impuesto deducible',
                                                                    PID.CPR_0 AS 'Precio Coste',
                                                                    PID.LINAMTCPR_0 AS 'Coste Stock',
                                                                    PID.LINCSTPUR_0 AS 'Coste Compra',
                                                                    PID.PRTFLG_0 AS 'Fra Parcial'

                                                                FROM " & CurrentSchema & ".PINVOICE AS PIH
                                                                INNER JOIN "&CurrentSchema&". PINVOICED AS PID ON PIH.NUM_0 = PID.NUM_0          "
                                                          ])
in
    Origen","ReferencedQueriesFormulaText":{}}

queries.name: Proveedor
queries.lastLoadedAsTableFormulaText:
{"IncludesReferencedQueries":false,"RootFormulaText":"let
    CurrentServer = Instancia,
    CurrentDatabase = BaseDeDatos,
    CurrentSchema = Esquema,
    Origen = Sql.Database(CurrentServer, CurrentDatabase, [Query="
                                                                SELECT
                                                                    BPSNUM_0 AS 'ProveedorID',
                                                                    BPSNAM_0 AS 'Proveedor',
                                                                    BPSTYP_0 AS 'Tipo Proveedor',
                                                                    BSGCOD_0 AS 'Categoria',
                                                                    ABCCLS_0 AS 'Categoria ABC',
                                                                    BPAADD_0 AS 'Direccion',
                                                                    (BPSNUM_0 + '-' + BPAADD_0 + '-1') AS 'IdDireccion'
                                                                FROM " & CurrentSchema & ".BPSUPPLIER"
                                                          ])
in
    #"Origen"","ReferencedQueriesFormulaText":{}}

queries.name: Direccion
queries.lastLoadedAsTableFormulaText:
{"IncludesReferencedQueries":false,"RootFormulaText":"let
    CurrentServer = Instancia,
    CurrentDatabase = BaseDeDatos,
    CurrentSchema = Esquema,
    Origen = Sql.Database(CurrentServer, CurrentDatabase, [Query="
                                                                SELECT  
                                                                BPATYP_0 'Tipo dir',
                                                                BPANUM_0 'IdTercero',
                                                                BPAADD_0 'CodDireccion',
                                                                (BPANUM_0 + '-' + BPAADD_0 + '-' + cast(BPATYP_0 as varchar)) 'IdDireccion',
                                                                BPADES_0 'Descripcion',
                                                                BPAADDLIG_0 'Direccion linea 1',
                                                                BPAADDLIG_1 'Direccion linea 2',
                                                                BPAADDLIG_2 'Direccion linea 3',
                                                                POSCOD_0 'Codigo postal',
                                                                CTY_0 'Ciudad',
                                                                SAT_0 'Provincia',
                                                                CRY_0 'Pais',
                                                                CRYNAM_0 'Nombre Pais',
                                                                TEL_0 'Telefono 1',
                                                                TEL_1 'Telefono 2',
                                                                TEL_2 'Telefono 3',
                                                                TEL_3 'Telefono 4',
                                                                TEL_4 'Telefono 5',
                                                                FAX_0 'Fax',
                                                                MOB_0 'Movil',
                                                                WEB_0 'Email 1',
                                                                WEB_1 'Email 2',
                                                                WEB_2 'Email 3',
                                                                WEB_3 'Email 4',
                                                                WEB_4 'Email 5',
                                                                FCYWEB_0 'Sitio web'                                                               
                                                                FROM " & CurrentSchema & ".BPADDRESS BPA  
                                                                
                                                          "])
in
    #"Origen"","ReferencedQueriesFormulaText":{}}

queries.lastLoadedAsTableFormulaText:
{"IncludesReferencedQueries":false,"RootFormulaText":"let
    MinDateYear = 2020, 
    //Date.Year(List.Min(#"Factura Compras"[Fecha Contable])),
    StartDate= Date.From(Text.From(MinDateYear)&"-01-01"),
    MaxDateYear = 2026,
    //Date.Year(List.Max(#"Factura Compras"[Fecha Contable])),
    Length = Duration.Days(Date.From(#date(MaxDateYear,12,31)) - StartDate)+1,
    

    Source = List.Dates(StartDate, Length, #duration(1, 0, 0, 0)),
    #"Converted to Table" = Table.FromList(Source, Splitter.SplitByNothing(), null, null, ExtraValues.Error),
    #"Renamed Columns" = Table.RenameColumns(#"Converted to Table",{{"Column1", "Date"}}),
    #"Changed Type" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(#"Renamed Columns",{{"Date", type date}}),
    Custom1 = #"Changed Type",
    #"Inserted Year" = Table.AddColumn(Custom1, "Year", each Date.Year([Date]), Int64.Type),
    #"Inserted Month Name" = Table.AddColumn(#"Inserted Year", "Month Name", each Date.MonthName([Date]), type text),
    #"Inserted Month Year Key" = Table.AddColumn(#"Inserted Month Name" , "MonthYearKey", each Date.Year([Date]) * 100 + Date.Month([Date]), Int32.Type),
    #"Inserted Month Year" = Table.AddColumn(#"Inserted Month Year Key" , "Month Year", each Text.Start([Month Name],3) & ", " & Text.From([Year]), type text),
    #"Inserted Day Name" = Table.AddColumn(#"Inserted Month Year" , "Day Name", each Date.DayOfWeekName([Date]), type text),
    #"Inserted Month" = Table.AddColumn(#"Inserted Day Name", "Fin Month", each if Date.Month([Date]) >=7 then Date.Month([Date])-6 else Date.Month([Date])+6  , Int64.Type),

queries.name: Articulos
queries.lastLoadedAsTableFormulaText:
{"IncludesReferencedQueries":false,"RootFormulaText":"let
    CurrentServer = Instancia,
    CurrentDatabase = BaseDeDatos,
    CurrentSchema = Esquema,
    Origen = Sql.Database(CurrentServer, CurrentDatabase, [Query="
                                                                SELECT
                                                                    -- 1. IDENTIFICACIÓN Y CATEGORIZACIÓN
                                                                    ITM.ITMREF_0        AS 'IdItem',
                                                                    ITM.CPY_0           AS 'Sociedad',
                                                                    ITM.TCLCOD_0        AS 'IdCategoria',
                                                                    TXCAT.TEXTE_0       AS 'Categoria',
                                                                    ITM.ACCCOD_0        AS 'Codigo Contable',
                                                                    ITM.ITMDES1_0       AS 'Descripcion 1',
                                                                    ITM.ITMDES2_0       AS 'Descripcion 2',
                                                                    ITM.ITMDES3_0       AS 'Descripcion 3',

                                                                    -- 2. UNIDADES Y LOGÍSTICA
                                                                    ITM.STU_0           AS 'Unidad',
                                                                    ITM.VACITM_0        AS 'Nivel Impuesto',
                                                                    ITM.BUY_0           AS 'Comprador',
                                                                    ITM.CCE_0           AS 'Linea Negocio',

                                                                    -- 3. FAMILIAS ANALÍTICAS (CON TRADUCCIONES)
                                                                    ITM.TSICOD_0        AS 'Codigo Familia',
                                                                    TXT.TEXTE_0         AS 'Familia',
                                                                    ITM.TSICOD_1        AS 'Codigo Subfamilia',
                                                                    TXT2.TEXTE_0        AS 'Subfamilia',

                                                                    -- 4. COSTES Y COMPRAS (ITMMASTER)
                                                                    ITM.PURBASPRI_0     AS 'Precio Base',
                                                                    ITM.CPRCOE_0        AS 'Coef Gastos Entrega',
                                                                    ITM.CPRAMT_0        AS 'Coste Fijo Unitario',

                                                                    -- 5. DATOS DE VENTAS (ITMSALES)
                                                                    ITMS.BASPRI_0       AS 'Precio Base Ventas',
                                                                    ITMS.THEPRI_0       AS 'Precio Teorico',
                                                                    ITMS.MINPRI_0       AS 'Precio Minimo',
                                                                    ITMS.MINPFM_0       AS 'Margen Minimo',
                                                                    ITMS.MINQTY_0       AS 'Cantidad Minima',
                                                                    ITMS.MAXQTY_0       AS 'Cantidad Maxima'

                                                                FROM " & CurrentSchema & ".ITMMASTER AS ITM
                                                                LEFT JOIN " & CurrentSchema & ".ITMSALES AS ITMS 
                                                                    ON ITM.ITMREF_0 = ITMS.ITMREF_0

                                                                -- Traducción de Familia (Tabla 20)
                                                                LEFT JOIN " & CurrentSchema & ".ATEXTRA AS TXT 
                                                                    ON ITM.TSICOD_0 = TXT.IDENT2_0  
                                                                    AND TXT.CODFIC_0 = 'ATABDIV' 
                                                                    AND TXT.ZONE_0 = 'LNGDES' 
                                                                    AND TXT.IDENT1_0 = '20' 
                                                                    AND TXT.LANGUE_0 = 'SPA'

                                                                -- Traducción de Subfamilia (Tabla 21)
                                                                LEFT JOIN " & CurrentSchema & ".ATEXTRA AS TXT2 
                                                                    ON ITM.TSICOD_1 = TXT2.IDENT2_0 
                                                                    AND TXT2.CODFIC_0 = 'ATABDIV' 
                                                                    AND TXT2.ZONE_0 = 'LNGDES' 
                                                                    AND TXT2.IDENT1_0 = '21' 
                                                                    AND TXT2.LANGUE_0 = 'SPA'

                                                                -- Traducción de Categoría de Artículo
                                                                LEFT JOIN " & CurrentSchema & ".ATEXTRA AS TXCAT 
                                                                    ON ITM.TCLCOD_0 = TXCAT.IDENT1_0 
                                                                    AND TXCAT.CODFIC_0 = 'ITMCATEG' 
                                                                    AND TXCAT.ZONE_0 = 'TCLAXX' 
                                                                    AND TXCAT.LANGUE_0 = 'SPA'
                                                          "])
    
in
    Origen","ReferencedQueriesFormulaText":{}}

LEFT JOIN " & CurrentSchema & ".ATEXTRA ATX6001 ON POH.YTIPPED_0 = ATX6001.IDENT2_0 AND ATX6001.CODFIC_0 = 'ATABDIV' AND ATX6001.IDENT1_0 = '6001' AND ATX6001.ZONE_0 = 'LNGDES'

    CurrentServer = Instancia,
    CurrentDatabase = BaseDeDatos,
    CurrentSchema = Esquema,
    Origen = Sql.Database(CurrentServer, CurrentDatabase, [Query="
                                                                SELECT 
                                                                    POHNUM_0 AS 'Documento',
                                                                    CPY_0 AS 'IdSociedad',
                                                                    POHFCY_0 AS 'Planta',
                                                                    ORDDAT_0 AS 'Fecha',
                                                                    ORDREF_0 AS 'Nº OCC',
                                                                    ZNUM_REPORT_0 AS 'Nº de report', 
                                                                    (cast(XREFERENCI_0 as varchar) + ' - ' + M6200.LANMES_0) AS 'Clase pedido',
                                                                    (YTIPPED_0 + ' - ' + ATX6001.TEXTE_0 ) AS 'Tipo pedido',
                                                                    BPSNUM_0 AS 'IdProveedor',
                                                                    BPRNAM_0 AS 'Proveedor',
                                                                    BPAADD_0 AS 'IdDireccion',
                                                                    BUY_0 AS 'Comprador',
                                                                    POSCOD_0 AS 'Codigo postal',
                                                                    SAT_0 AS 'Provincia',
                                                                    CTY_0 AS 'Ciudad',
                                                                    CRY_0 AS 'IdPais',
                                                                    CRYNAM_0 AS 'Pais',
                                                                    PTE_0 AS 'IdCondPago',
                                                                    BPTNUM_0 AS 'IdTransportista',
                                                                    VACBPR_0 AS 'Regimen impuesto',
                                                                    CUR_0 AS 'Divisa',
                                                                    TOTLINAMT_0 AS 'Importe BI',
                                                                    TOTLINATI_0 AS 'Importe II'
                                                                FROM " & CurrentSchema & ".PORDER POH
                                                                LEFT JOIN " & CurrentSchema & ".APLSTD M6200 ON POH.XREFERENCI_0 = M6200.LANNUM_0 AND M6200.LANCHP_0 = '6200' AND M6200.LAN_0 = 'SPA'
                                                                LEFT JOIN " & CurrentSchema & ".ATEXTRA ATX6001 ON POH.YTIPPED_0 = ATX6001.IDENT2_0 AND ATX6001.CODFIC_0 = 'ATABDIV' AND ATX6001.IDENT1_0 = '6001' AND ATX6001.ZONE_0 = 'LNGDES'

                                                          "]),
    #"Tipo cambiado" = Table.TransformColumnTypes(Origen,{{"Fecha", type date}})
in

queries.name: Pedidos Lineas
text: CASE POQ.LINCLEFLG_0 WHEN 2 THEN 'Si' ELSE 'No' END AS 'Linea saldada'
INNER JOIN " & CurrentSchema & ".PORDERP POP ON POQ.POHNUM_0 = POP.POHNUM_0 AND POQ.POPLIN_0 = POP.POPLIN_0
